Class Member

java.lang.Object
libraryApp.Member
public class Member extends Object
Represents a library member with contact information. REFACTORING IMPROVEMENTS: ✓ Added comprehensive JavaDoc documentation ✓ Added input validation in constructor ✓ Improved null handling ✓ Better code organization ✓ Added validation in setters

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Member(String id, String name)
    Simplified constructor for creating a member with minimal details.
    Member(String id, String name, String email, String phone)
    Full constructor for creating a member with all details.

  • Constructor Details

    • Member

      public Member(String id, String name, String email, String phone)
      Full constructor for creating a member with all details. REFACTORING: Added null checks and default values
      Parameters:
      id - Member unique identifier
      name - Member name
      email - Member email address
      phone - Member phone number

    • Member

      public Member(String id, String name)
      Simplified constructor for creating a member with minimal details. Email and phone will be set to empty strings.
      Parameters:
      id - Member unique identifier
      name - Member name

      public String getToSave()
      Returns a semicolon-delimited string for file storage. REFACTORING: Improved formatting consistency

    • asString

      public String asString()
      Returns a human-readable string representation. REFACTORING: Improved formatting and null handling
